summary: Complete verification of partner image replacements. All 140 partner listings verified: NO Pexels URLs found in any API response or on the frontend. Backend tests: 19/19 passed. Hotels(38), Restaurants(54), CafeBars(36), BeachClubs(12) all return non-Pexels image URLs.

backend_api_tests.hotels_endpoint: PASS - /api/hotels returns 38 hotels with non-Pexels images
backend_api_tests.restaurants_endpoint: PASS - /api/restaurants returns 54 restaurants with non-Pexels images
backend_api_tests.cafe_bars_endpoint: PASS - /api/cafe-bars returns 36 cafe/bars with non-Pexels images
backend_api_tests.beach_clubs_endpoint: PASS - /api/beach-clubs returns 12 beach clubs with non-Pexels images
backend_api_tests.pexels_url_check: PASS - 0 Pexels URLs found across all 140 partner listings

frontend_ui_tests.partner_images_display: PASS - Partner sections display images correctly
frontend_ui_tests.no_pexels_urls: PASS - Page-wide scan found 0 Pexels URLs
frontend_ui_tests.image_loading: PASS - 66/69 images fully loaded (3 lazy loading)

passed_tests: All 38 hotels have valid image URLs
All 54 restaurants have valid image URLs
All 36 cafe/bars have valid image URLs

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 140 partner listings verified to have non-Pexels images. Image sources: Hotels use authentic images from official hotel websites (Belmond, Hilton Cap Rocat, Son Brull, Bordoy Hotels, Simpson Travel, etc). Restaurants and Cafes/Bars use themed Unsplash images categorized by venue type. Beach clubs use official venue website images (Purobeach, Nikki Beach, Beso Beach, etc). Golf courses use Cloudinary-hosted images from greenfee365. No broken images detected.
